caption: A man sits in a recording studio, wearing a black baseball cap with a gold emblem, a black t-shirt that says "CHECK IT", and gold necklaces. He wears headphones over his ears and speaks into a professional microphone on a boom arm. Behind him is a white wall featuring a repeated logo with the words "HUSTLE" and gold stars, alongside a larger red and black sign that reads "BOSS TALK 101". Overlaid graphics on the screen include a logo that says "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" on the left and "BOSS TALK 101" on the right. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, shifting his head slightly and speaking, while his facial expression and the background elements remain constant.
